framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.what_it_is: Disassemble and benchmark a product to expose its cost, manufacturing, and design tradeoffs, then publish the findings.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can read a physical product back into the design and manufacturing decisions behind it, not just describe what it does.

paths.what_it_is: Own a project end-to-end - design it in CAD, fabricate and test it, and publicly document the full iteration loop.
paths.why_it_signals: It gives a hiring manager direct, verifiable evidence of design judgment and hands-on execution instead of a resume claim.

paths.what_it_is: Build deep fluency in geometric dimensioning and tolerancing and tolerance-stack analysis, and show it through authored training material or standards work.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can make assemblies fit and function correctly at scale, the exact skill that prevents costly manufacturing and quality failures.
